dct_title_s: New York City Census Block Groups, 2020
dct_description_sm: New York City Census Block Groups, 2020 is a polygon theme representing census block groups in New York City in 2020. In September 2023, Columbia Libraries staff downloaded the block group definitions from the Census Department from the website at https://www.census.gov/geographies/mapping-files/time-series/geo/tiger-line-file.2020.html clipped the files to the Borough Boundaries, projected the data to STate Plane coordinates and converted the file to the Geopackage format.
dct_creator_sm: United States. Bureau of the Census. Geography Division
dct_publisher_sm: United States. Bureau of the Census. Geography Division
dct_rightsHolder_sm: United States. Bureau of the Census. Geography Division
